details: Compound 3 = 2-(3-Methoxybenzyloxy)isoindolin-1,3-dione; mp 120-121 °C confirmed in synthesis section ('White foamy solid (214.6 mg, 62%) ... m.p. 120-121 °C'). DOI 10.3390/molecules29122942 present in paper.
DFTNAN = 2,4,6-trinitro-3,5-difluorophenyl methyl ether; DSC endothermic peak at 82 °C indicating melting confirmed in Section 3.1.1. DOI 10.3390/ma14154186 present.
L8 ligand (5,5'-Bis-bipyridyl-bi-thiadiazole) mp 248-250 °C confirmed in Table II row 'L 8 80 Dioxane/DMF 248-250 C'. DOI 10.3390/80300310 present.
Compound 9i mp 206-207 °C confirmed in experimental section. DOI 10.3762/bjoc.20.154 present in paper.

Compound 3 (4,9-diamino thienopyridindione) mp > 320 °C from diethyl malonate route confirmed ('Compound 3 ... recrystallized from ethanol as orange crystals; m. p. > 320 oC'). DOI 10.3390/71000756 present.
Compound 3c = 2-{3-(4-Chlorophenyl)-2-[(2-cyanophenyl)-hydrazono]-3-oxo-propylideneamino}-tetrahydro-benzothiophene-3-carboxylic acid ethyl ester; mp 189 °C confirmed. DOI 10.3390/81200910 present.
Compound 5 = 4-Benzyl-2-mercaptomethyl-2H-phthalazin-1-one; mp 145-146 °C confirmed ('White crystals, 80%, 0.10 g. mp 145-146 °C'). DOI 10.3390/ph4081158 present.

(Sp)-4h paracyclophane bis-phosphine oxide mp 127-128 °C confirmed in experimental ('(Sp)-...bis(bis(3,5-dimethylphenyl)phosphine oxide) [(Sp)-4h] ... M.p. 127-128 °C'). DOI 10.3390/molecules31030494 present.
Compound 10 = 4-(5"-carboxyethyl-4"-thiazolidinone-2"-acetylazino)-4'-acetyldiphenyl sulphide; mp 260 °C decomp confirmed in table ('10 260°C, decomp'). DOI 10.3390/80800622 present.
3e = 4-(4-Hydroxyphenyl)-N-phenylpiperazine-1-carbothioamide; mp 196.83 °C confirmed (DSC; 'White solid; 196.83 °C'). DOI 10.1021/acsomega.5c12576 present.

Compound 6b = N-[(3,5-dimet[h]yl-1H-pyrazol-1-yl)-methyl]-2,4-dichloroaniline; mp 108-110 °C confirmed ('Yield 91%; mp 108-110 °C; Rf 0.69'). Paper uses 'dimetyl' typo; CSV corrects to 'dimethyl' — acceptable. DOI domain confirmed via PMC12937307.

Ginsenoside Compound K form IV; second melting endothermal peak 178.5 °C confirmed in Section 2.2 ('the second melting endothermal peak followed at about 178.5 °C'). DOI 10.3390/molecules26071983 present.
Myricetin experimental Tm 638.75 K confirmed in Table 1; conversion 638.75-273.15=365.6 °C correct. DOI 10.3390/molecules30010199 present.

Compound 8 = 3,6-Dimethylpyrazolo[5,1-b]thiazole-2,7-dicarbonyl Azide; mp 120-121 °C confirmed ('precipitate 8 ... yield 90%; mp 120-121 °C'). CSV calls it 'diazide' vs paper's 'Azide' — minor stylistic; compound identity/value/source correct. DOI 10.3390/molecules26175383 present.
Compound 2d = 3,3-Dichloro-4-(chloromethyl)-1-phenylpyrrolidin-2-one; mp 127-130 °C confirmed in Section 3.1.3 ('Physical state: white solid, m.p. 127-130 °C'). DOI 10.3390/molecules29092035 present.
4c = 4-fluoro-5-(4-ethylpiperazin-1-yl)-2-nitroaniline; M.P. 143-145 °C confirmed ('Yield 6.73 g, 94.91%, M.P.: 143-145 °C'). DOI 10.3390/molecules31050844 present.
Complex 8 = Pb(II) complex of compound 4 (5-methyl-1,3,4-oxadiazole-2(3H)-thione); mp 78 °C confirmed in Table 1 ('8 78 Yellow 0.6 ...'). DOI 10.1007/s13738-021-02358-x present.

Methanoic acid (formic acid) Melting Peak -49.4 ± 0.01 °C confirmed in Table 5 ('Methanoic acid | 64-18-6 | Fatty Acid | 233.81 ± 0.95 | -50.4 ± 0.02 | -49.4 ± 0.01'). Property DSC_peak corresponds to melting peak column — Q2 OK. DOI 10.3390/ma13204486 present.

Nitrobenzene mp 6 °C from Table 1 (literature compilation in review paper). Q3 'measured' acceptable since values are experimental observations compiled from literature. DOI 10.1002/jps.24034 present.
M10 thiopyrimidine sulfonamide acetamide; mp 224-226 °C confirmed ('White powder, mp 224-226 °C, 693 mg, 88%'). DOI 10.3390/molecules29194778 present.
4-Methylquinolin-2(1H)-one (2p); m.p. = 220-222 °C confirmed in section 4.2.16. DOI 10.1021/acsomega.5c13222 present.
Compound 35 = Cis-2,6-dimethyl-N-(morpholino)methylenebisphosphonic acid; mp 222 °C confirmed ('was obtained with a 59% yield; mp. 222 °C'). DOI 10.3390/ph19020256 present.

(Sp)-5a paracyclophane bis(diphenylphosphanyl); M.p. 105-106 °C confirmed ('(Sp)-...-bis(2-(diphenylphosphanyl)phenyl)-...-[(Sp)-5a]. 328 mg, 90% yield; white solid; M.p. 105-106 °C'). DOI 10.3390/molecules31030494 present.
Hofmeisterin I (compound 1) mp 86-87 °C confirmed ('to yield 800 mg of 1 as white crystals (61%), mp 86-87 °C'). DOI 10.1021/acsomega.6c01037 present.

o,o'-Quaterphenyl (compound 17) mp 110-113 °C confirmed in synthesis section ('to yield o,o'-quaterphenyl as a white solid (0.040 g, mp 110-113 °C, lit 116-118 °C, 20% yield)'). DOI 10.3762/bjoc.15.258 present.
